    Returns all resources of a specific resource group.

    Updates individual fields of a resource (PATCH semantics: null = unchanged).

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control with parameters of type Resource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ResourceControlAdapter.isAvailable(Resource resource)
    Indicates whether the resource is currently reachable via this adapter (e.g.
    void
    ResourceControlAdapter.sendCommand(Resource resource, String command, String param, int slot)
    Sends a control command with an optional free parameter to the resource.
    void
    ResourceControlService.sendCommand(Resource resource, String command, String param, PUser user)
    Sends a control command to a resource.
    boolean
    ResourceControlAdapter.supports(Resource resource)
    Indicates whether this adapter can control the given resource in principle (capability check, independent of the current online state).
